generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations within AGREE clauses.
Move implementation-level references to the implementation annex; type-level guarantees should reference only visible features.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Valid AGREE scalar types are `int`, `real`, and `bool`.
anti_patterns: Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the AADL model.
Do not add architecture to fix AGREE errors; focus on contract correction.
